objectives: Full test coverage audit of the mx20022 payments runtime workspace at /Volumes/Everything/Development/k2payments
constraints: Assess all #[cfg(test)] sections, integration tests/, CI config, and dead test files
important_facts: Third-pass audit. Commit 70f8383 (fix: Address critical security, performance, and architecture findings) introduced major test improvements across the workspace.
Total test functions (workspace source, excluding target/): 80 test functions across 34 files.

22-crate workspace: mx20022-runtime, mx20022-runtime-core, mx20022-config, mx20022-participants, mx20022-crypto, mx20022-store (sqlite/postgres/rocksdb), mx20022-correlation, mx20022-admin, mx20022-session, mx20022-metrics, mx20022-channels (http/grpc/tcp/file/kafka/nats/amqp), mx20022-cli, mx20022-correlation.
CI: fmt + clippy + cargo-deny + cargo test --workspace + cargo llvm-cov --fail-under-lines 1 (threshold is 1%, effectively no gate).
No proptest/quickcheck/criterion/testcontainers/mockall in lockfile or any Cargo.toml.
tests/fixtures/ and tests/harness/: still empty stubs.

mx20022-runtime-core/tests_missing.rs: NOW fully compiled (mod tests_missing) — 5 tests covering Poison-commit path, Poison-abort path, state machine transitions, context type-mismatch, and prepare-error-triggers-abort-rollback.
mx20022-runtime/src/engine.rs: NOW 6 tests — infer_message_type (json/xml/fallback), build_tx_id_prefix, next_tx_id uniqueness, extract_inbound_auth static_bearer rejection/acceptance.
mx20022-runtime/src/domain.rs: NOW 2 tests — validates_happy_path, rejects_empty_required_fields (covers all 5 fields in one test body).
mx20022-runtime/src/application.rs: NOW 2 tests — begin_record_maps_request_fields, map_outcome_covers_all_variants (all 3 enum arms).
mx20022-crypto/src/lib.rs: NOW 5 tests — roundtrip, empty key rejection, wrong-key decryption fail, unsupported algorithm, tampered ciphertext.
mx20022-participants/duplicate_checker.rs: NOW 4 tests — aborts on dup, prepares on no dup, prepares on missing XML keys, marks_first_matching_duplicate_key.

mx20022-store-sqlite/lib.rs: 3 tests (begin_find_update_complete_transaction, expectation_and_dead_letter_round_trip, query_applies_sql_filters_and_limit) + tests_missing.rs: 7 tests (find_by_message_id, find_by_uetr, find_by_end_to_end_id, complete_transaction all outcomes, replay_dead_letter error for unknown id, list_dead_letters filters, update_transaction errors when not found).
mx20022-store-postgres/lib.rs: 2 tests using connect_or_skip() — only run if DATABASE_URL env var is set. Silently skip in standard CI (no Postgres service container).
mx20022-admin/auth.rs: 5 tests covering JWT roles, denied role, mTLS, legacy token, readonly path.
mx20022-channels/channel-http, kafka, nats, amqp: ZERO tests.

mx20022-runtime/src/app.rs: 6 tests (builds_runtime_from_valid_config, processes_message_through_pipeline, duplicate_checker aborts, recovers_incomplete_transactions, reloads_participant_configs, rejects_reload_when_topology_changes).
E2E test: crates/mx20022-runtime/tests/e2e_pipeline.rs — 1 test covering full config->app->process->store pipeline.

REMAINING GAPS: RocksDB store (zero tests), channel-http/kafka/nats/amqp (zero tests), CLI (zero tests), routing_engine missing no-route error path, rate_limiter missing per-message-type and per-channel scope tests, correlation missing reload_pending test, session missing reconnect_after_failure and heartbeat tests, admin missing unauthorized path tests for gRPC/HTTP.
decisions_made: Confirmed PostgresStore tests silently skip in CI — they use connect_or_skip() guard with no DATABASE_URL service container in ci.yml: tests pass trivially without exercising Postgres at all.
Coverage threshold of 1 line is effectively no gate — passes on any compile.
All prior gaps flagged as CRITICAL in last audit have been addressed except: RocksDB zero tests, channel adapter tests, CLI zero tests, coverage threshold meaningless.
risks_issues: RocksDB store: zero tests — production storage backend entirely unvalidated. If deployed, data loss or corruption would be silent.
Postgres tests silently skip: connect_or_skip() returns None when DATABASE_URL is absent — CI always passes trivially for postgres tests.
Coverage gate is 1 line (--fail-under-lines 1): provides no regression protection. Could drop to 0 and still pass.
channel-http/kafka/nats/amqp: zero channel adapter tests — the inbound receivers for most production protocol paths are untested.
mx20022-cli: zero tests. No validation of CLI argument parsing or startup command surface.
RateLimiter: only 1 test covering Global scope burst exhaustion. MessageType and SourceChannel scopes untested.
CorrelationEngine: register+match+timeout combined in 1 test — reload_pending (from store) path not independently verified.
Session: 1 test covering sequence tracking. reconnect_after_failure and heartbeat_tick paths untested.
RoutingEngine: no-route error path (no rules, no default) untested — prepare() returns Err in that case.
Admin HTTP/gRPC: only happy-path authorized requests tested — unauthorized/malformed auth paths not tested at handler level.

iteration.summary: Third full pass. Since the previous audit, commit 70f8383 addressed every CRITICAL gap previously flagged: engine.rs now has 6 tests, domain.rs has 2, application.rs has 2, crypto has 5 covering all error paths, circuit_breaker has 2 (including auto-recovery), duplicate_checker has 4 (including multi-key and no-XML-keys cases), acknowledgement_builder and status_response_builder both have their abort/overwrite paths covered, and runtime-core's tests_missing.rs is now compiled with 5 high-value 2PC edge-case tests. SQLite store tests_missing.rs contributes 7 additional store-layer tests. Total workspace test count is approximately 80 functions. The remaining gaps are: RocksDB store (zero tests), channel-http/kafka/nats/amqp (zero tests), Postgres tests that silently skip in CI, a coverage gate of 1% that is effectively no gate, and an empty benches/ directory.
outputs_produced: Comprehensive test coverage audit report delivered to user
next_actions: Add #[cfg(test)] block to mx20022-store-rocksdb using tempfile crate for isolated on-disk tests
Add Postgres service container to ci.yml (services: postgres:16) so connect_or_skip tests actually run in CI
Raise coverage threshold from 1 to 60 (lines) once RocksDB and channel gaps are filled
Add RoutingEngine test: no rules and no default_route should return Err from prepare()
Add RateLimiter tests for MessageType and SourceChannel scope isolation
Add Session tests for reconnect_after_failure and heartbeat_tick paths
Add CorrelationEngine test for reload_pending independently (seed expectation, then call reload_pending, verify index populated)
Add admin HTTP/gRPC unauthorized path tests (missing/wrong bearer, missing role)
Add criterion benchmark harness for TransactionManager.process() throughput

mentions.relevance_note: CryptoService now has 5 tests including tampered ciphertext and wrong-key — matches sec audit recommendation. Admin unauthorized paths still not tested at handler layer.
engine.rs complexity flagged by CR — now has 6 focused unit tests. RocksDB store still zero tests, also a quality concern.
Arch review noted store backend abstraction — RocksDB remaining untested is an architecture risk for any production deployment using that backend.
